data.title: GREEN: Add Step 7.5 Anti-Pattern Scan to SKILL.md
data.description:
Add new Step 7.5 between Step 7 and Step 8 in plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md:
- Dispatch scan sub-agent using prompts/anti-pattern-scan.md with confirmed root cause pattern
- Collect candidate list, experimentally confirm each
- Group candidates by file (same-file instances → same sub-agent)
- Dispatch fix sub-agents in batches of up to 5
- Commit between batches following COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md (including review)
- Define explicit empty-scan exit: zero confirmed candidates → record empty result → proceed to commit

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task 8fee-554f test_step_7_5_exists passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_step_7_5_exists.*PASS'
- [ ] Task 8fee-554f test_batch_dispatch passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_batch_dispatch.*PASS'
- [ ] Task 8fee-554f test_commit_between_batches passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_commit_between_batches.*PASS'
- [ ] Task 8fee-554f test_empty_scan_exit passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_empty_scan_exit.*PASS'
